mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(t.cnt), 0) AS total, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type IN ('quotation', 'quote') THEN t.cnt ELSE 0 END), 0) AS quotation, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'contract' THEN t.cnt ELSE 0 END), 0) AS contract, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'order' THEN t.cnt ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `order`, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'invoice' THEN t.cnt ELSE 0 END), 0) AS invoice FROM ( SELECT ai.type AS type, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT at.instance_id FROM approval_task at INNER JOIN approval_instance ai ON ai.id = at.instance_id WHERE at.approver_id = #{approverId} AND at.status = #{pendingStatus} AND ai.current_node_id = at.node_id ) pending INNER JOIN approval_instance ai ON ai.id = pending.instance_id GROUP BY ai.type ) t
mapper.update:
update approval_task
node_id = #{approvalTask.nodeId},
instance_id = #{approvalTask.instanceId},
approver_id = #{approvalTask.approverId},
status = #{approvalTask.status},
type = #{approvalTask.type},
action = #{approvalTask.action},
create_time = #{approvalTask.createTime},
update_time = #{approvalTask.updateTime},
create_user = #{approvalTask.createUser},
update_user = #{approvalTask.updateUser},
id = #{approvalTask.id}
